rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JEANETTA SANDERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the "declaration" supplementing the petition should have been made by the Court-appointed fiduciary, not the attorney, there were still no detailed schedules of receipt and gains on sales, and the schedule of losses attached to the "declaration" was not, in fact, detailed (no date of the sale, carry value, sale value and net loss).

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROYAL IRREVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For 1) Revocation, Cancellation, And/Or Voiding Of Irrevocable Trust - Mistake; 2) Revocation, Cancellation, And/Or Voiding Of Irrevocable Tr
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/29/19 - No response to issues raised in the tentative ruling for 6/24/19. In the Supplement filed 6/11/19, Trustee/beneficiary Sheree Jones died in April 2019. In a Second Supplement to Petition, signed and verified by Petitioner, please set forth the current Trustee and the successors-in-interest to Sheree's share of the Trust. If any of the parties named in the Second Supplement have not already received or waived proper notice, please contact Examiner for a later hearing date to allow time for proper notice. Endorsed-filed copies of all documents must be received in Room 202 by 7/23/19. If nothing has been received by 7/23/19, an appearance will be required for the Court to consider taking this Petition off calendar for lack of response.
